headline: Assessing Home Depot (HD) Valuation After Loss Prevention Headlines And Softer Home Improvement Demand
summary: Home Depot (HD) has been under pressure after high profile loss prevention incidents and softer demand for home improvement projects, as higher interest rates and weaker housing activity weigh on investor sentiment. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. The recent loss prevention headlines, softer home improvement demand and a 1 day share price return of a 1.77% decline, alongside a 7 day share price return of a 4.95% decline and a 30 day share price return of a 7.92% decline, contrast with...
